title: 'After Greenland and Iran, the Hungarian election marks a new step in the transatlantic rift'
subhead: The crushing electoral defeat of Hungarian Prime Minister Viktor Orban, despite massive support from Washington, underscores the failure of Donald Trump's ideological campaign in Europe. The gap is widening inexorably, writes Le Monde columnist Sylvie Kauffmann.

title: Firing of respected French publisher demonstrates billionaire Bolloré's tightening grip
